title: Leads
description: The ability to put people on a leash.
body:
**Leads - Advanced Player Leashing Plugin**

_Version: **1.3**
Supported Platform: Paper **1.21.4**_

This plugin revolutionizes player interaction by introducing advanced leashing mechanics to your Minecraft server. Players can now use leads to create persistent connections with other players, enabling new gameplay possibilities for roleplay, transportation, and cooperative activities.

**Key Features:**

Player Leashing: Use a lead on another player to create an unbreakable connection. The leash maintains its integrity regardless of distance, allowing for seamless player transportation across any terrain.

Secure Tethering: Attach leashed players to fence posts to create permanent anchor points. This system provides reliable player confinement without distance limitations.

Visual Connection: The plugin maintains clear visual leash effects between players and anchor points, ensuring intuitive gameplay understanding.

Vanilla Integration: Works seamlessly with existing Minecraft mechanics using standard lead items and fence post blocks for natural player adoption.

The plugin offers perfect functionality for various server types:

Prison servers can securely transport inmates

Roleplay servers enable new interactive scenarios

Mini-game servers can create unique player management systems

Adventure maps gain new puzzle mechanics

Requiring no additional configuration or commands, Leads provides immediate functionality upon installation. The robust distance-resistant leashing system ensures reliable performance in all gameplay situations, while maintaining full compatibility with other Paper 1.21.4 plugins and server modifications.
